title: Protests and boycotts rock prestigious Venice Biennale
description: The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.

title: Tracking the hot-button issues driving this year's midterms politics
description: Record high oil prices, war with Iran, and controversial immigration policies are just some of the issues for voters. NPR's Domenico Montanaro talks about covering this year's complex midterms.

title: DOJ sees fallout after push to prosecute former FBI director James Comey
description: Several prosecutors have left the Justice Department, others are considering doing so, and at least one major case has been disrupted.

title: With GOP wins on election maps, Democrats have a steeper climb to victory
description: Republicans are eight seats closer to keeping control of the House, making Democrats’ climb toward reclaiming power in November more difficult.

title: This powerful Democrat’s job is on the line over redistricting
description: Maryland Senate President Bill Ferguson (D) faces a tough primary challenge after defying Democratic leaders including Gov. Wes Moore on redistricting.

title: Week in Politics: Redistricting fight in Tennessee and Virginia; latest poll on Trump
description: We look at the redistricting battles in Tennessee and Virginia, as well as what the latest poll numbers say about President Trump's handling of the economy and the war on Iran.

title: Southern Republicans redistrict after Supreme Court rules, Dems lose big in Virginia
description: The Supreme Court weakened minority voting rights and prompted Republicans in four states to move to redistrict as part of Trump's push. A court nullified Democratic redistricting in Virginia.

title: National mood is against Republicans, but redistricting could help prop them up
description: The national political landscape looks bad for President Trump and Republicans, but recent wins in the redistricting fight could soften the blow they might have suffered without them.

title: ABC argues Trump administration is trying to chill free speech
description: In a filing, ABC accuses the Trump administration of trying to chill its constitutionally protected free speech. The point of contention: "The View," and whether it's subject to equal time rules.

title: White House prepares to replace FDA leader Marty Makary amid agency turmoil
description: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary has faced criticism over his leadership of the agency that oversees vaccine and drug approvals.

title: Virginia’s high court strikes down voter-passed House map favoring Democrats
description: The finding is a major setback for Democrats in their effort to counter GOP-led redistricting in other states. The measure approved April 21 gave Democrats an edge in four districts.

title: Judge rules DOGE’s cuts to humanities grants were unconstitutional
description: A federal judge said more than $100 million in cuts to NEH grants were discriminatory, ruling in a case that revealed the inner workings of DOGE.

title: Virginia Supreme Court rules against voters' referendum on redistricting
description: The Virginia Supreme Court has delivered a striking blow to Democrats in the redistricting battle they're waging against Republicans.

title: Tennessee Democrat speaks about his erased district
description: NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with Democratic Congressman Steve Cohen of Tennessee, who represents that state's 9th Congressional district, which could be eliminated based on a new redistricting map.

title: What's behind Trump's pardons of people convicted of public corruption?
description: President Trump has granted pardons to officials who were convicted of public corruption while also dismantling a federal office responsible for investigating and prosecuting corruption allegations.

title: Rubio charms in Rome, but he says Trump’s verbal attacks may continue
description: The secretary of state held warm meetings with Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and Pope Leo XIV after the president’s repeated criticism of both leaders.

title: Trump says ceasefire still intact after burst of violence with Iran
description: The president expressed optimism about reaching a deal despite the attacks. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the U.S. is expecting a response from Iran on Friday.

title: Court rejects Virginia redistricting in a blow to Democrats' counter to Trump, GOP
description: Virginia voters approved redistricting that could help Democrats pick up four House seats. Democrats said it was to counter the gains that Trump and the GOP have picked up in Republican-led states.

title: Anti-woke Vivek Ramaswamy confronts racism in his run for Ohio governor
description: Vivek Ramaswamy built a political brand casting racism as an obsession of Democrats. As a Republican running for Ohio governor, he’s facing racism on the right.
